name: ExtensionResearchSubject_Status
title: R5: draft | active | retired | unknown additional codes
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ResearchSubject.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ResearchSubject.status` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ResearchSubject.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `ResearchSubject.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `ResearchSubject.status` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ResearchSubject.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ResearchSubject.status` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `ResearchSubject.status` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.
The target context `ResearchSubject.status` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.

element.short: R5: draft | active | retired | unknown additional codes

element.definition: The publication state of the resource (not of the subject).

binding.description: Codes that convey the current publication status of the research study resource.
